---
title: "Cardinal Henry Edward Manning"
---

## Cardinal Henry Edward Manning

**Dates:** (1808-1892)

### Description

churchman

### Biography

He married (1834) Caroline Sargent (d. 1837), He resigned his archdeaconry in 1850 and was received with James Robert Hope into the Roman Catholic church 6 April 1851.  He was ordained priest that June; and became a Cardinal in 1875.

### Letters

- Letter from January 2, 1897
- Letter from August 6. [1869]
- Letter from 20 October [1850]
- Letter from Midsummer Day [24 June 1850[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
